content.query:
CREATE VIEW         v_M3_SalesCubeData
-- drop view v_M3_SalesCubeData
as 
SELECT              ODH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,                   OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                   LE.ACDT as [Date]
,                   IM.ITNO COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part ID]
,                   IM.ITDS COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS as [Part Description]
,                   SUM(OL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT) as [Sales Amt]
,                   SUM(ODL.IVQT) as [Sales Qty]
,                   SUM(ODL.DCOS) as [Cost]
,                   CASE WHEN SUM(ODL.IVQT) < 1 then 'Return' else 'Sales' end as [Sales Type]
FROM                M3.FSLEDG LE
JOIN                M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN
JOIN                M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date) 
JOIN                M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX 
JOIN                M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX 
JOIN                M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO JOIN M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO 
WHERE               LE.TRCD = 10 
and                 ODH.ACDT <> 0 
and                 IM.ITCL <> 'ZZZ' 
GROUP BY            ODH.CUNO, OC.CUNM, LE.ACDT, IM.ITNO, IM.ITDS
